heading: Administration
label: 10826 Administration

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out this subchapter through the Administrator of the Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: b Regulations
children.text: Not later than 6 months after , the Secretary shall promulgate final regulations to carry out this subchapter and subchapter III.November 27, 1991
